errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.offline: Could not reach the server. Check your internet connection and try again.

subtitles.register: Join the community and help make roads safer
subtitles.resetPassword: Enter your email and we will send you an 8-digit reset code.
subtitles.verifyEmail: Enter the 8-digit code we sent to {{email}}
subtitles.setNewPassword: Enter the 8-digit code sent to {{email}} and choose a new password

links.noAccount: Do not have an account? Sign up

alerts.invalidEmailMessage: Please enter a valid email address.
alerts.invalidPasswordMessage: Password should be at least 6 characters.
alerts.resetEmailSentMessage: Please check your inbox for reset instructions.
alerts.genericMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
alerts.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Please log in.
alerts.emailNotVerifiedMessage: Confirm your email address before signing in. We can send you a new code.
alerts.invalidCodeMessage: That code is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
alerts.codeResentMessage: We sent a new code to {{email}}.
alerts.passwordMismatchMessage: Make sure both password fields are identical.
alerts.passwordUpdatedMessage: You're now signed in with your new password.

one.title: Report Hazards Instantly
one.description: Snap a photo and let AI detect road defects, estimate severity, and tag your location automatically.

two.title: Navigate Safely
two.description: View nearby hazards on the live community map and avoid high-risk roads before you drive.

three.title: Verify & Update
three.description: Help keep reports accurate by voting whether hazards are still active or already fixed.

four.title: Earn Trust Badges
four.description: Contribute consistently, gain trust points, and unlock contributor badges in your profile.

home.mapSubtitle: Tap to explore hazards near you
home.activityEmptyMessage: Report your first hazard to start building your contribution history.

history.title: My Reports
history.emptyMessage: Reports you submit will appear here. Tap the camera button to add your first one.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.hint: This permanently deletes your JalanGuard account — including web developer access, if you have any. Hazards you've reported stay on the map for public safety, but will no longer show your name. Enter your password to confirm.
delete.passwordRequiredMessage: Enter your password to confirm deletion.

account.title: Account
account.emailHint: Your email address can't be changed from the app.
account.nameSavedMessage: Your display name has been updated.
account.currentPasswordRequired: Enter your current password to confirm.
account.samePasswordMessage: Your new password must be different from the current one.

notificationSettings.title: Notifications
notificationSettings.intro: Choose what JalanGuard should notify you about.

myReports.label: Updates on my reports
myReports.subtitle: Votes, status changes and resolutions on hazards you submitted.

nearbyHazards.label: New hazards near me
nearbyHazards.subtitle: When someone reports a hazard close to your location.

trustMilestones.label: Trust score & milestones
trustMilestones.subtitle: When your trust score changes or you reach a contribution milestone.

notificationSettings.footnote: Push delivery isn't enabled yet — these preferences are saved and will apply as soon as it is.

camera.permissionMessage: JalanGuard needs your camera to photograph road hazards for reporting.

hazardDetail.title: Hazard Detail
hazardDetail.missingMessage: We couldn't load this hazard. Please go back and try again.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyMessage: Updates about the reports you submit will appear here.

submission.title: Submit Report
submission.locationRequired: A GPS location is required to submit. Enable location and retake the photo.
submission.analyzingHint: Checking your photo for road hazards.
submission.hazardTypeLockedHint: Automatically detected by AI — this can't be changed.
submission.multiTypeNote: Multiple hazard types were detected and will both be reported.
submission.severityLockedHint: Assessed by AI from the detected damage.
submission.descriptionPlaceholder: Add any detail that helps crews find and assess the hazard…
submission.successMessage: Thanks for helping keep the roads safe. Your report is now on the map.
